content: If you are a new volunteer interested in translating content from Chinese, please use the above thread! Thank you <:Pandia_love:1459078512303411261>

For those who are new (and returning volunteers as well!), please start here for the current status and information!

__**For Translators:**__
For English, BIAV currently has two in-house translators on staff (Ace and Mia), who are actively working on translating all remaining MTL content. Currently, ~85% of all text has been human translated into English, meaning the primary workload will focus on getting the remaining workload completed. As of current time of posting, all main story text is now completed, and remaining work consists of primarily of character and event stories. In order to better coordinate this effort, work on English contributions will be assigned on an individual basis by an English moderator (me and Mercy). Priority will obviously be given to any content that you prefer working on, though should there be a conflict in workload or if Ace/Mia are already actively working on a story, we may assign a different story or task to you.

__**For Editors/Proofreaders:**__
As much of text is now professionally translated, high-level editing work is currently not our primary focus. If you wish to do high-level editing and revision work, please contact me directly as there are only a few sections of the text which currently need structural and substantive editing, which will be assigned on an individual basis. 

Low-level editing work, consisting primarily of light copyediting and proofreading, is applicable to the entirety of the game and may be done at-will. These edits should focus on addressing consistency errors, missing or inaccurate details, inconsistencies in structural formatting such as numbers and abbreviations, or mistakes in spelling, grammar, or punctuation. Please note that much of the character and event story content is still machine translated at this point, and thus we do not recommend editing this work as it will eventually be replaced with a human translation.

__**For Playtesters:**__
Playtesting can be done by all members and we welcome all contributions! Please feel free to test various aspects of the game, and call out any formatting or implementation errors you notice ingame. Please note that there is a configurable hotkey ingame which can be used to toggle text field identifiers, which will assist with locating the problematic fields for any text issues ingame - please make sure to provide this identifier as well with any error reports. We will create a section specifically for errors found via playtesting for escalation to the developers to fix.
